description: Slip-on sandals have never looked this good. These brown leather wedges from catwalk are versatile enough to go with everything: from jeans to dresses, making them perfect for everyday wear.UpperStraps on the forefoot and midfoot with velcro closures for a snug FitSoft fabric lining for added comfortFarbic lined footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfortOutsoleWedge heel with textured design on the sidesTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and grooved heel for better gripSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlightUse a branded leather conditioner and brush to restore shoe shine
